## Description / Excerpt

A practical model of intuition as sensing, probing, and navigation through dynamic fields where destinations cannot be known in advance.

Excerpt:

## 0. What This Is (and Isn’t) This is not a philosophy of intuition. It is not a personality trait. It is not mystical, moral, or predictive. This is an **operational model**. It treats intuition as a *navigation system*—one that works in uncertain, dynamic fields where destinat

## Working Read

This is the best local statement of intuition as navigation in a dynamic field rather than mystical certainty. It fits the intuition attractor because it keeps embodied sensing, calibration, and motion in view.

## Core Claim

Intuition is pattern recognition before explanation, most useful when destinations cannot be known in advance.
